MAP.COMMENT: --- Get period event statuses from config ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: EVENTS
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Challenge Period Events Update for EVENTS completionIDType ---

MAP.COMMENT: --- Set Old Event Value equal to 0 ---
--- Compare positions of old & new event id in Completion Id list ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check position of new event in comparison to old event ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: %newEventPosition% < %oldEventPosition%
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- JMS.EventMnemonic has higher priority than challengePeriodEvents.eventId ---

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Old Event Value is greater than New Event Value for challengePeriodEvents/challengePeriodEventId = %challengePeriodEvents/challengePeriodEventId% & challengePeriods/challengePeriodId = %challengePeriods/challengePeriodId%

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if Insert to Events table and Updation of Periods table is required ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: true
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Insert new Event into DB and Update Periods table ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: --- VE-877 Update Period_Actual_value with total of Event_Value from Period_Events table ---

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.COMMENT: --- Check size of list of events fetched from DB ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: ---- Check if all events have been added in DB or some are remaining ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: %eventsInDB%<%countValue%
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Insert new Event into DB and Update Periods table ---

Values.value: Count of Events in DB is equal to Count Value in BRE for challengePeriods/challengePeriodId = %challengePeriods/challengePeriodId%, with count = %countValue%

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if Insert to Events table and Updation of Periods table is required ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: true
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Insert new Event into DB and Update Periods table ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: --- VE-877 Update Period_Actual_value with total of Event_Value from Period_Events table ---

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.COMMENT: --- Set Old Event Value equal to 0 ---
--- Map eventMnemonic,eventDate,status and post limit points ---
